economic_notes: War Lake Convenience Store Ltd. operates a convenience store with Video Lottery Terminals onsite. Keeyask Hydropower Limited Partnership investment of $450,000. War Lake Hydro Trust Fund related to Manitoba Hydro Keeyask Hydroelectric development negotiations. Investments in Missinippi Rail Limited Partnership, Keewatin Railway Corporation, and Cree Nation Partners Limited Partnerships.
notes: War Lake First Nation is located in Manitoba. Consolidated entities include War Lake Administration, War Lake Social Services, War Lake Hydro Trust Funds, and War Lake Convenience Store Ltd. The nation adopted PS 3400 revenue recognition standard effective April 1, 2023 on a prospective basis. Portfolio investments increased by $450,000 due to investment in Keeyask Hydropower Limited Partnership. War Lake Hydro Trust balance decreased significantly from $273,933 to $4,790 during the year. Capital lease obligation fully paid off during the year. Advances of $150,000 were repaid during the year. The financial statements include a segment for Hydro Development - Keeyask Project related to negotiations with Manitoba Hydro. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC, CMHC, Solicitor General, and Province of Manitoba transfers.
